text.title: Embedding Generation Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from corpus + model id to a validated producer config and working code.

step.name: scope-and-confirm-schema
step.input: Chosen model id + dim (from embeddings-model-selection); target store kind + collection.
step.action: Assert collection.schema_dimension == model_dim. If a new collection is needed, create it BEFORE writing producer code; never alter an in-use schema.

step.name: design-cache-keys
step.action: Cache key = sha256(normalized_text) + ":" + model_id + ":" + dim. Choose backend (redis for shared workers, sqlite for single-host, memory for ephemeral).

step.name: batch-async-with-rate-budget
step.input: Provider limit (e.g. OpenAI batch 2048 inputs); requests/min budget.
step.action: Set batch.size to the provider limit (or below). Set concurrency by total_rpm / (60 * per_request_seconds). Use asyncio.Semaphore to bound parallel batches.

step.name: normalize-when-cosine
step.action: If cosine → L2-normalize vectors immediately after the provider call; set normalize=true. If dot or euclidean → leave as-is, set normalize=false.

step.name: persist-and-validate-config
step.action: Emit JSON per content/02-output-contract.xml. Run scripts/validate-embedding-generation.py against it. Commit to repo alongside producer code.

text.reference: Async batched producer with content-hash cache.
